text: 我喜欢看机械方面的杂志
text_en: I like to read mechanics magazines

text: 我的胃口很好
我早上起来的时候，多半觉得睡眠充足，头脑清醒
text_en: When I wake up in the morning I usually feel well rested and clear-headed

text: 我想我会喜欢图书管理员的工作
text_en: I think I would like the work of a librarian

text: 我很容易被吵醒
text_en: I am easily awakened by noise

text: 我喜欢看报纸上的犯罪新闻
text_en: I like to read crime news in the newspaper

text: 我的手脚经常是很暖和的
text_en: My hands and feet are usually warm

text: 我的日常生活中，充满了使我感兴趣的事情
text_en: My daily life is full of things that interest me

text: 我现在工作(学习)的能力，和从前差不多
text_en: My ability to work (or study) is about the same as before

text: 我的喉咙里总好象有一块东西堵着似的
text_en: I often feel as if there is something stuck in my throat

text: 一个人应该去了解自己的梦，并从中得到指导和警告
text_en: A person should try to understand their dreams and get guidance from them

text: 我喜欢侦探小说或神秘小说
text_en: I like detective or mystery novels

text: 我总是在很紧张的情况下工作
text_en: I always work under a great deal of tension

text: 我每个月至少有一、二次拉肚子
text_en: I have diarrhea at least once or twice a month

text: 偶尔我会想到一些坏得说不出口的事
text_en: I occasionally think of things too bad to say out loud

text: 我深信生活对我是残酷的
text_en: I am convinced that life has been cruel to me

text: 我的父亲是一个好人
text_en: My father was a good man

text: 我很少有大便不通的毛病
text_en: I rarely have trouble with constipation

text: 当我干一件新的工作时，总喜欢别人告诉我，我应该接近谁
text_en: When I start a new job I like to be told who I should get to know

text: 我的性生活是满意的
有时我非常想离开家
text_en: Sometimes I have a very strong desire to leave home

text: 有时我会哭一阵笑一阵，连自己也不能控制
text_en: Sometimes I laugh or cry in a way I cannot control

text: 恶心和呕吐的毛病使我苦恼
似乎没有一个人了解我
text_en: It seems no one understands me

text: 我想当一个歌唱家
text_en: I would like to be a singer

text: 当我处境困难的时候，我觉得最好是不开口
text_en: When I am in trouble I think it is best to keep my mouth shut

text: 有时我觉得有鬼神附在我身上
text_en: Sometimes I feel as if there are spirits inside me

text: 当别人惹了我时，我觉得只要有机会就应报复，这是理所当然的
text_en: When someone wrongs me I feel I should get even when I get the chance

text: 我有胃酸过多的毛病，一星期要犯好几次，使我苦恼
text_en: I am bothered by excess stomach acid several times a week

text: 有时我真想骂人
每隔几个晚上我就做恶梦
text_en: I have nightmares every few nights

text: 我发现我很难把注意力集中到一件工作上
text_en: I find it hard to keep my mind on a task or job

text: 我曾经有过很特别，很奇怪的体验
text_en: I have had very unusual and strange experiences

text: 我时常咳嗽
假如不是有人和我作对，我一定会有更大的成就
text_en: If people had not had it in for me I would have achieved much more

text: 我很少担心自己的健康
text_en: I rarely worry about my health

text: 我从来没有为了我的性方面的行为出过事
text_en: I have never gotten into trouble because of my sexual behavior

text: 我小的时候，有一段时间我干过小偷小摸的事
text_en: When I was young I stole things occasionally for a while

text: 有时我真想摔东西
text_en: Sometimes I feel like smashing things

text: 有很多时候我宁愿坐着空想，而不愿做任何事情
text_en: Often I would rather sit and daydream than do anything

text: 我曾一连几天、几个星期、几个月什么也不想干，因为我总是提不起精神
text_en: I have had days or weeks or months when I could not take interest in anything because I had no energy

text: 我家里人对我已选择的工作(或将要选择的职业)不满意
text_en: My family is not satisfied with the job I have chosen (or will choose)

text: 我睡得不安，容易被惊醒
text_en: My sleep is restless and I am easily awakened

text: 我觉得我的头到处都疼
text_en: I feel pain in various parts of my head

text: 有时我也讲假话
我的判断力比以往任何时候都好
text_en: My judgment is better than it ever was

text: 每星期至少有一、二次，我突然觉得无缘无故地全身发热
text_en: At least once or twice a week I suddenly feel hot all over for no reason

text: 当我与人相处的时候，听到别人谈论希奇古怪的事，我就心烦
text_en: When I am with people it bothers me to hear strange or unusual stories

text: 最好是把所有的法律全都不要
text_en: It would be better if all laws were done away with

text: 有时我觉得我的灵魂离开了我的身体
text_en: Sometimes I feel my soul has left my body

text: 我的身体和我的大多数朋友一样地健康
text_en: My body is as healthy as most of my friends

text: 遇到同学或不常见的朋友，除非他们先向我打招呼，不然我就装作没看见
text_en: When I meet classmates or acquaintances I pretend not to see them unless they speak first

text: 一位牧师(和尚、道士、神父、阿訇等教士)能用祈祷和把手放在病人的头上来治病
text_en: A minister or priest can cure disease by prayer and laying hands on the sick

text: 认识我的人差不多都喜欢我
text_en: Most people who know me like me

text: 我从来没有因为胸部痛或心痛而感到苦恼
text_en: I have never been troubled by pain in my chest or heart

text: 我小时候，曾经因为胡闹而受过学校的处分
text_en: When I was young I was sometimes punished for mischief at school

text: 我和别人一见面就熟了(自来熟)
text_en: I get along with people easily as soon as I meet them

text: 一切事情都由老天爷按排好了
text_en: Everything is prearranged by fate or heaven

text: 我时常听从某些人的指挥，其实他们还不如我高明
text_en: I often take orders from people who are not as capable as I am

text: 我不是每天都看报纸上的每一篇社论
text_en: I do not read every editorial in the paper every day

text: 我从未有过正常的生活
text_en: I have never had a normal life

text: 我的身体某些部分常有象火烧、刺痛、虫爬、麻木的感觉
text_en: Parts of my body often have feelings like burning, tingling, crawling, or numbness

text: 我的大便正常，不难控制
text_en: My bowel movements are regular and not hard to control

text: 有时我会不停地做某一件事，直到别人不耐烦为止
text_en: Sometimes I keep on doing something until others lose patience

text: 我爱我的父亲
我能在我周围看到其他人所看不到的东西、动物和人
text_en: I can see things, animals, or people around me that others cannot see

text: 我希望我能像别人那样快乐
text_en: I wish I could be as happy as others seem to be

text: 我从未感到脖子(颈)后面疼痛
text_en: I have never felt pain at the back of my neck

text: 和我性别相同的人对我有强烈的吸引力
text_en: People of my own sex are strongly attracted to me

text: 我过去经常喜欢玩"丢手帕”的游戏
text_en: I used to enjoy playing drop-the-handkerchief

text: 我觉得许多人喜欢夸大自己的不幸，以便得到别人的同情和帮助
text_en: I think many people exaggerate their misfortunes to get sympathy and help

text: 我为每隔几天或经常感到心口(胃)不舒服而烦恼
text_en: I am bothered by an upset stomach every few days or more often

text: 我是个重要人物

男性：我总希望我是个女的
女性：我从不因为我是女的而遗憾
text_en: Male: I have often wished I were a girl. Female: I have never been sorry I am a woman

text: 我有时发怒
我时常感到悲观失望
text_en: I often feel downcast and hopeless

text: 我喜欢看爱情小说
text_en: I like to read love stories

text: 我喜欢诗
我的感情不容易受伤害
text_en: My feelings are not easily hurt

text: 我有时捉弄动物
我想我会喜欢干森林管理员那一类的工作
text_en: I think I would like the work of a forest ranger

text: 和人争辨的时候，我常争不过别人
text_en: When I argue I often lose to others

text: 任何人只要他有能力，而且愿意努力工作是能成功的
text_en: Anyone who is able and willing to work hard can succeed

text: 近来，我觉得很容易放弃对某些事物的希望
text_en: Lately I find it easy to give up hope about some things

text: 有时我对别人的东西，如鞋、手套等等所强烈吸引，虽然这些东西对我毫无用处，但我总是想摸摸它或把它偷来
text_en: Sometimes I am strongly attracted by others' things (e.g. shoes, gloves) and want to touch or take them even though I have no use for them

text: 我确实缺少自信心
我愿意做一名花匠
text_en: I would like to be a florist

text: 我总觉得人生是有价值的
text_en: I always feel that life is worthwhile

text: 要使大多数人相信事实的真相，是要经过一番辨论的
text_en: It takes a lot of argument to convince most people of the truth

text: 有时我将今天应该做的事，拖到明天去做
text_en: Sometimes I put off until tomorrow what I should do today

text: 我不在乎别人拿我开玩笑
text_en: I don't mind people making fun of me

text: 我想当个护士
text_en: I would like to be a nurse

text: 我觉得大多数人是为了向上爬而不惜说谎的
text_en: I think most people would lie to get ahead

text: 许多事情，我做过以后就后悔了
text_en: I have often regretted things I have done

text: 我几乎每星期都去教堂(或常去寺庙)
text_en: I go to church (or temple) almost every week

text: 我几乎没有和家里人吵过嘴
text_en: I have hardly ever quarreled with my family

text: 有时我有一种强烈的冲动，去做一些惊人或有害的事
text_en: Sometimes I have a strong urge to do something shocking or harmful

text: 我相信善有善报，恶有恶报
text_en: I believe in reward for good and punishment for evil

text: 我喜欢参加热闹的聚会
text_en: I like to go to lively parties

text: 我碰到一些千头万绪的问题，使我感到犹豫不决
text_en: I run into problems that are so tangled I feel uncertain what to do

text: 我认为女的在性生活方面，应该和男的有同等的自由
text_en: I think women should have the same sexual freedom as men

text: 我认为最难的是控制我自己
text_en: The hardest thing for me is controlling myself

text: 我很少有肌肉抽筋或颤抖的毛病
text_en: I rarely have muscle cramps or twitching

text: 我似乎对什么事情都不在乎
text_en: I seem not to care about anything

text: 我身体不舒服的时候，我有时发脾气
text_en: When I don't feel well I sometimes lose my temper

text: 我总觉得我自己好象做错了什么事或犯了什么罪
text_en: I often feel as if I have done something wrong or committed a sin

text: 我经常是快乐的
我时常觉得头胀鼻塞似的
text_en: I often feel as if my head is stuffed or my nose blocked

text: 有些人太霸道，即使我明知他们是对的，也要和他们对着干
text_en: Some people are so bossy that I do the opposite even when I know they are right
